title: Faculty of Health Sciences, Department of Nutrition and Dietetics Faculty Member Dr. Tuba Günebak's book chapter Gerontechnology: Multidisciplinary Approaches was published in the book
content:
Faculty of Health Sciences, Department of Nutrition and Dietetics Faculty Member Dr. Tuba Günebak's book chapter Gerontechnology: Multidisciplinary Approaches was published in the book

Perşembe

ISTUN Faculty of Health Sciences, Department of Nutrition and Dietetics Faculty Member Dr. Tuba Günebak's book chapter titled "The Importance of Nutrition in Geriatric Context and Gerontechnological Approaches" was published in the book Gerontechnology: Multidisciplinary Approaches book.

We congratulate our faculty member and wish her continued success.
